title: Preserve Decomposed Foundation Contract Surfaces
forbids: missing decomposed foundation operation names, domain artifact identities or public surface, required strategy rules imports, or declared projection artifact dependencies
why: Foundation contract currentness spans the fixed decomposed operation names, artifact identity and public surfaces, and declared projection dependencies. Generic artifact blueprint rules separately own artifact module and catalog shape; package tests and types own projection behavior.
message: Keep Foundation operation names, artifact identities and public surfaces, strategy rule imports, and projection artifact dependencies aligned.
